blocks.hero_alt: Sunlit hallway representing a welcoming entry

blocks.title: A Space Where You Don't Have to Carry It All.
blocks.body:
Finding the right therapist is a lot like finding a home. It has to feel right. Because the connection between us is the single most important factor in successful therapy, I offer a complimentary 15-minute consultation call for all new clients.

This is a low-pressure way for us to discuss what’s bringing you to therapy, how I can help, possible modalities we might use like EMDR or IFS-informed parts work, and to ensure we're a good fit before we begin working together.

items.title: Free Parking
items.text: The Liberty Street parking lot at 204 Liberty St, SW typically has the best availability.

items.title: Garage Parking
items.text: The Town Hall garage at 10 Loudoun St, SW is a reliable paid option. The first two hours are free. Please read any signage for specifics or changes.

items.title: Street Parking
items.text: Metered spots are available on Wirt St SW as well as the intersection of Liberty St and Royal St SW next to the Birkby House.

blocks.title: Arriving for Your In-Person Session
blocks.body:
The office is located at **19 Wirt St SW,** in the heart of Leesburg. You'll see a round sign marked 19 Wirt on the building, the same building as Shake & Bops Cafe.

To reach the entrance:

* Facing the front of the building, look to the left. You will see two small brick steps, a small iron gate, and a narrow brick walkway along the side of the white wall.
* Follow the path: Walk down the brick path along the side of the building.
* When you reach the bank of mailboxes, turn right. You'll see a white door with a welcome mat.

Once inside, head upstairs. Take the stairs immediately to your left. (Straight through the glass door will take you to the cafe.)

The waiting area is at the top of the stairs. Please feel free to use the restroom or help yourself to a cold drink from the fridge. I'll come out to greet you at our scheduled time.
Facing the front of the building, you'll see the cafe's red door. **To enter the office, look to the left of the building for a small iron gate and narrow brick walkway.**
blocks.image_alt: image of a white brick little house from early 1900s with a metal roof, black shutters, and red front door which is the home of Wildwood Psychotherapy in Leesburg, VA
blocks.subtitle: Same building as Shake & Bops Cafe.
blocks.title: Location

blocks.subtitle: Follow the Path
blocks.body: Step up the two small brick steps leading to a narrow brick walkway. Follow the pathway, walking down along the side of the building until you see a bank of mailboxes on the wall. Immediately to your right will be the door for the entrance.
blocks.image_alt: narrow brick walkway along the white brick wall of the building that houses Wildwood Psychotherapy
